headline: Dow spikes by over 1,300, oil prices retreat in ceasefire rally
summary: All three of the major indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Wednesday's session with colossal gains — the Dow Jones Industrial Average skyrocketed by over 1,320 points (2.85%) and the Nasdaq Composite surged by nearly 620 points (2.8%) — after President Trump announced that Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire last night. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the trading day's biggest sector gainers.

headline: Nasdaq tech leads strong Wall Street rebound after Iran ceasefire deal

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Lam Research (LRCX) After A 275% One Year Surge?
summary: Wondering whether Lam Research is priced fairly after such a strong run, or if the current share price is getting ahead of itself. The stock last closed at US$224.35, with reported returns of 5.0% over 7 days, 12.6% over 30 days, 21.2% year to date and 275.1% over the past year.
